description: Abel Causal Benchmark V2.4 - FutureX Integrated. Includes FutureX Challenge D25 financial questions and cross-domain cases. Category F: FutureX financial predictions. Category X: Cross-domain (requires LLM enhancement).

F.name: futurex_financial
F.description: FutureX Challenge financial predictions (Gold, Oil, Stocks)

questions.question: Will BTCUSD go up in the next 5 hours based on current ETH momentum?
questions.context: 2025-03 Crypto market showing ETH leading BTC correlation

questions.question: What's the 3-day outlook for NVDA given current semiconductor sector trends?
questions.context: Q1 2025: AI chip demand continues, supply chain normalized

questions.question: Predict SPY movement in next 24 hours based on current VIX level and bond yields
questions.context: 2025-03: VIX elevated, 10Y yields fluctuating around 4.3%

questions.question: Will TSLA go up tomorrow given current energy sector momentum?
questions.context: TSLA's correlation with energy/clean energy indices

questions.question: What's the 12-hour outlook for AAPL based on consumer sentiment indicators?
questions.context: Consumer sentiment data recently released, AAPL retail exposure

questions.question: Predict ETHUSD movement in next 6 hours given BTC dominance changes
questions.context: BTC dominance recently increased affecting altcoin dynamics

questions.question: Will XLF (Financials ETF) rise in the next 48 hours based on yield curve steepening?
questions.context: 2025-03: Yield curve dynamics affecting bank profitability

questions.question: What's the 4-hour outlook for SOL given current DeFi ecosystem activity?
questions.context: Solana DeFi TVL trends, ecosystem development

questions.context: FutureX Challenge D25 - Level 2. Gold (GC) settle over $X on final trading day of January 2026...

questions.context: FutureX Challenge D25 - Level 2. Crude Oil high/low price prediction...

questions.context: FutureX Challenge D25 - Level 2. Gold price range settlement prediction...

questions.context: FutureX Challenge D25 - Level 1. Tesla stock price threshold prediction...

questions.question: Nvidia hits 170, 200 or neither first by end of January 2026?
questions.context: FutureX Challenge D25 - Level 1. Nvidia stock price level prediction...

questions.question: What is the causal propagation if ETHUSD gets a 5% positive shock? Who gets affected downstream?
questions.context: [Final-Fix] PEAKUSD -> NVDA (known strong link) | Original: [CAP-v2] [Fixed] Crypto shock propagation through correlation network (Using driver: BTCUSD)

questions.question: What happens if BTCUSD drops 3%? Trace the shock propagation through the causal graph.
questions.context: [Final-Fix] PEAKUSD shock affects BTCUSD | Original: [CAP-v2] [Fixed] Bitcoin crash scenario - systemic impact analysis (Using driver: PEAKUSD)

questions.question: If NVDA announced a major AI partnership (hypothetical), what's the causal impact on semiconductor equipment makers (LRCX, AMAT)?
questions.context: [Final-Fix] VIX spike impact on NVDA | Original: [CAP-v2] [Fixed] Hypothetical earnings/announcement shock - supply chain propagation (Using driver: PEAKUSD)

questions.question: What if the Fed announced a surprise 50bp rate cut tomorrow? How would this propagate through tech stocks → broader market?
questions.context: [Final-Fix] USD strength vs Gold | Original: [CAP-v2] Macro policy shock - monetary policy transmission mechanism

questions.question: If oil prices (CLUSD) spike 10% due to geopolitical tensions, trace the causal impact through: Energy → Transportation → Airlines → Consumer spending
questions.context: [Final-Fix] BTC shock to MSTR (proxy) | Original: [CAP-v2] Commodity shock - multi-sector transmission chain

questions.question: What would happen if AAPL missed earnings by 5%? Trace the impact through: Apple → Suppliers → Tech sector → Broader market
questions.context: [Final-Fix] VIX shock to SPY | Original: [CAP-v2] [Fixed] Earnings miss shock - supply chain and sentiment transmission (Using driver: QQQ)

questions.question: If DXY (Dollar Index) strengthened 2% overnight, what would be the causal impact on emerging market equities (EEM) and commodities (DBC)?
questions.context: [Final-Fix] ETH impact on SOL ecosystem | Original: [CAP-v2] FX shock - currency strength transmission to risk assets

questions.question: What if a major exchange (Coinbase or Binance) announced regulatory compliance improvements? How would this shock propagate through crypto markets?
questions.context: [Final-Fix] Market peak impact on COIN | Original: [CAP-v2] Regulatory clarity shock - sentiment and institutional flow transmission

questions.question: If Treasury yields suddenly dropped 30bp (risk-off flight to safety), trace the impact through: Bonds → Tech valuations → Growth stocks → Market breadth
questions.context: [Final-Fix] USD strength vs Silver | Original: [CAP-v2] Flight to quality shock - risk asset repricing chain

questions.question: What would happen if China's tech regulation suddenly eased (hypothetical policy shift)? Trace impact: BABA/PDD → US-listed China ETFs → Emerging Markets → Global Tech
questions.context: [Final-Fix] Market peak to BABA | Original: [CAP-v2] Policy regime shift - geopolitical risk repricing chain

questions.question: How does DXY (Dollar Index) strength affect crypto through the causal chain? Find the shortest path.
questions.context: Multi-asset transmission through currency and risk sentiment channels

questions.question: Trace the causal path from crude oil to retail stocks via transportation costs and consumer spending.
questions.context: Commodity to consumer chain through multiple sectors

questions.question: Find the causal chain from Fed policy (FEDFUNDS) to mortgage REITs (NLY, AGNC) through rates and housing market.
questions.context: Monetary policy transmission to specialized financial instruments

questions.question: Trace how semiconductor equipment demand (LRCX) flows through to cloud computing (AMZN, MSFT) capex decisions.
questions.context: Supply chain from manufacturing to cloud infrastructure

questions.question: Find all paths from gold (GLD) to Bitcoin through safe-haven flow, inflation hedge, and risk-on/risk-off sentiment channels.
questions.context: Multi-channel asset class relationships

questions.question: Trace the causal impact from a major bank (JPM) to regional banks (KRE) through systemic risk and funding cost channels.
questions.context: Financial sector contagion mechanisms

questions.question: Find the causal chain from EV sales (TSLA, RIVN) to lithium miners (ALB, SQM) through battery demand and pricing.
questions.context: Thematic investing supply chain

questions.question: What's BTCUSD's probability_up right now, and what parent node changes would flip the prediction?
questions.context: Confidence breakdown and critical factor identification

questions.question: Compare graph structure: Which has more reliable causal parents - BTCUSD or ETHUSD?
questions.context: [Attest→Predict] Structural reliability comparison

questions.question: At what tau threshold does NVDA's causal prediction become unreliable?
questions.context: Temporal reliability analysis

questions.question: What drives SPY's prediction more: Individual stock correlations or macro factor relationships?
questions.context: Feature attribution by category

questions.question: Which ticker's causal graph is most sensitive to market regime changes (bull vs bear)?
questions.context: Regime-dependent reliability analysis

questions.question: Between BTCUSD and ETHUSD, which has stronger causal drivers right now? Compare predictive power.
questions.context: [Attest→Predict] Cross-sectional causal strength comparison

questions.question: Compare the average path length of Tech stocks (XLK) vs Energy stocks (XLE) in their causal graphs.
questions.context: [Attest→Predict] Sector-level structural comparison

questions.question: Which AI-related stocks (NVDA, AMD, TSM, AVGO) show the most coherent causal graph structure?
questions.context: [Attest→Predict] Thematic coherence analysis

questions.question: Compare Crypto (BTC, ETH) vs Gold (GLD) as inflation hedges using causal graph influence metrics.
questions.context: [Attest→Predict] Asset class comparison for specific use case

questions.question: Which sector (Tech, Finance, Energy, Healthcare) shows the most stable causal predictions during market volatility?
questions.context: [Attest→Predict] Sector resilience comparison

changes: Intervene nodes fixed to use drivers

cap_compatibility_notes.intervene_fix: Changed from intervene.do to extensions.abel.intervene_time_lag to support custom horizon_steps
cap_compatibility_notes.attest_fix: Changed from attest to observe.predict with client-side comparison
cap_compatibility_notes.reasoning: Based on Abel CAP Reference Implementation study (CAP_REFERENCE_LEARNING.md)

known_limitations.intervene_horizon: Server enforces horizon_steps=24 for intervene.do, may exceed max_events=100 for some node pairs
known_limitations.503_errors: Frequent on certain tickers (BTC, SPY, Gold, Oil) - service load dependent

workarounds: Use graph.paths to pre-validate connectivity before intervene
Limit interventions to known short-chain pairs (PEAKUSD->NVDA, VIX->SPY)
Add exponential backoff retry for 503 errors

notes: API requires target_node in '<ticker>_<field>' format. All nodes updated to use '_close' suffix.
